title: schizocalyx obovatus
intro: Schizocalyx obovatus, also known as the African yellow ironwood or the yellow ironwood, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its bark, which is used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Schizocalyx obovatus include its ability to lower blood pressure, act as an anti-inflammatory, and exhibit antibacterial properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although its efficacy and safety may vary depending on the preparation method and individual tolerance.
